item.text: I’m going to scan the codebase for every place that *creates* `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallRequested` or `LoopAuditEvent::ToolCallResult`, then I’ll open each hit to confirm it’s construction (not just pattern-matching). I’ll start with `rg` searches across `crates/`.
